name: gotify-mcp
description: Gotify push notifications and management via MCP tools with HTTP fallback. Sends alerts for long-running tasks, plan completions, and blocked states.

gotify_mcp_url.title: Gotify MCP Server URL
gotify_mcp_url.description: URL of the gotify-mcp MCP server. Default http://localhost:9158 works if running via docker compose in this repo. Change if running on a different host or port.

gotify_url.title: Gotify Server URL
gotify_url.description: Base URL of your Gotify server, e.g. http://gotify or https://gotify.example.com. No trailing slash.

gotify_app_token.title: Gotify App Token
gotify_app_token.description: Gotify application token for sending messages. Found in Gotify UI under Settings → Apps → Create Application.

gotify_client_token.title: Gotify Client Token
gotify_client_token.description: Gotify client token for management operations (list messages, manage apps/clients). Found in Gotify UI under Settings → Clients.
